---
title: "Homework9"
author: "HudsonPlaskoff"
date: "2026-04-02"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(babynames)
```

## Proportion as Percentage^[Question 1 complete]
```{r}
babynames_prop_percent <- babynames %>% 
  mutate(
    prop_percent = str_glue("{str_sub(prop, 4, 4)}.{str_sub(prop, 5, 6)}%")
  ) %>%
  select(
    year,
    sex,
    name,
    n,
    prop,
    prop_percent
  )

knitr::kable(babynames_prop_percent %>% head())
```
